theme_and_archetype.description: An expensive, moody, and cinematic dark mode designed for power users. It uses 'Glassmorphism 2.0'—low opacity, soft diffused rim lights, and avoids pure black in favor of deep obsidian and slate.

general.padding: Generous spacing for marketing (p-12, p-16), tighter for dashboards (p-4, p-6).
general.border_radius: Rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for pills/buttons.

grids.marketing: Asymmetric Bento Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12) with wide gaps (gap-8).
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4) with tight gaps (gap-4). Modular, F-pattern data priority.

buttons.primary: bg-accent-primary text-background-primary font-bold rounded-full hover:bg-accent-primary_hover transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(245,158,11,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-surface-glass border border-surface-border backdrop-blur-md text-text-primary rounded-full hover:bg-surface-glass_hover hover:border-surface-border_hover transition-all

cards.marketing: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]
cards.dashboard: Flat Solid Dark: bg-[#0B0F19] border border-white/5 rounded-xl hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/10 transition-transform

charts.style: High contrast, no grid lines. One strong accent color per chart.
charts.north_star: Place most critical metric at top-left.

navigation.header: Sticky glass header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#030712]/70 border-b border-white/10 z-50.

motion.hover: Subtle glass lift (-translate-y-1) and rim light intensification.
motion.page_transition: Fade in and slide up (opacity 0 to 1, translateY 10px to 0).
motion.stagger: List items and dashboard widgets should stagger in.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for body text, 3:1 for large text. Off-white (#F9FAFB) used instead of pure white to reduce astigmatism glare.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-feedback-button').

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract dark network/web structure, great for AI connections.
hero_backgrounds.usage: Landing page hero background (needs dark overlay bg-black/60).
Section backgrounds or decorative card overlays.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette provided, avoiding default Tailwind purples or blues.
Implement 'Glassmorphism 2.0': Keep glass backgrounds very low opacity (5-10%) and rely on heavy backdrop-blur-xl and delicate 1px borders.
Ensure the dashboard utilizes the 'Control Room' grid (tight, modular, F-pattern for data scanning).
Include 'data-testid' on ALL buttons, inputs, links, and key stats.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Manrope for body text. Do not use Inter.
Implement Shadcn UI for complex dashboard components, heavily styled to match the dark glassmorphism theme.
Do not use generic gray backgrounds; always tint them toward the Obsidian base (#030712).
Make sure all files created are .js (not .tsx) as requested.
